_comment: TRUE POSITIVE — SP-104001: DNS Tunneling / Exfiltration via long subdomains (T1071.004)
scenario: Malware uses DNS tunneling to exfiltrate data: encodes payload in subdomain labels of DNS queries
why_tp: Subdomain labels are 64+ characters — far exceeds normal domain labels
TXT record queries — DNS tunneling tools prefer TXT for bidirectional comms
Domain evil-domain.com is 3 days old — fresh domain for C2
High entropy in subdomain text — Base64-encoded payload confirmed
20 queries/minute — automated, not human DNS activity
analyst_action: Block the domain evil-domain.com in DNS security gateway
Identify all hosts querying this domain
Investigate WORKSTATION-DEV-04 for the DNS tunneling malware
Reconstruct the tunneled data by collecting and decoding all subdomain labels in sequence
